2026-04-14T21:00:55.0778524Z ---
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0778875Z description: |
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0779422Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0780386Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0781426Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0782027Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0782358Z on:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0782712Z   push:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0783084Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0783518Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0783796Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0783970Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0784252Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0784418Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0784665Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0784825Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0786204Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0786760Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0787145Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0787497Z   noop:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0787875Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0788351Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0788713Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0789470Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0790370Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0790858Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0791368Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0791963Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0794798Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0795292Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0795710Z       steps:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0796138Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0796743Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0797290Z           env:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0797997Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0798882Z           with:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0799261Z             script: |
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0799838Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0800620Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0801439Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0802381Z                 return;
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0802814Z               }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0803067Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0803519Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0804407Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0805120Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0806607Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0807744Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0808790Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0809929Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0810653Z               }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0810890Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0811387Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0812331Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0812861Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0813495Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0814067Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0814670Z               });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0815223Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0815764Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0815915Z tools:

2026-04-14T21:00:55.0826825Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0826984Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0827401Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0827909Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0828293Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0828641Z   noop:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0829017Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0829477Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0829825Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0830560Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0831443Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0831927Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0832618Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0833193Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0833598Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0834028Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0834438Z       steps:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0834860Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0835445Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0836066Z           env:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0862777Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0863716Z           with:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0864097Z             script: |
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0864698Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0865492Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0866317Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0867301Z                 return;
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0867723Z               }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0867962Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0868219Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0869100Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0869758Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0870323Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0871383Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0872630Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0882017Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0883056Z               }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0883304Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0883610Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0884307Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0884827Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0885446Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0885996Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0886590Z               });
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0887134Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0887668Z 
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0887818Z tools:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0888174Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0888541Z   github:
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0888911Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0889237Z

2026-04-14T21:00:55.0890058Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0890876Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T21:00:55.0952531Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
